nodes.name: Admiralty cicadabird
nodes.summary: Admiralty cicadabird（Edolisoma admiralitatis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Admiralty cicadabird。

nodes.name: Edolisoma
nodes.summary: Edolisoma（Edolisoma）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联30种鸟类，如山鹃鵙、菲律宾黑鹃鵙、白翅鹃鵙等30种鸟类。

nodes.name: Admiralty cicadabird
nodes.summary: The Admiralty cicadabird or Manus cicadabird (Edolisoma admiralitatis) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to the Admiralty Islands. It was previously considered conspecific with the common cicadabird. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References
